species: First Comprehensive Proteome Analyses of Lysine Acetylation and Succinylation in Seedling Leaves of Brachypodium distachyon L.
tissue: the first lysine-acetylation and lysine-succinylation proteome analysis of seedling leaves in Brachypodium distachyon L (Bd).
sample_source: we processed the seeds, cultivated the seedlings and the seedling growth stages were determined...
strain: we used Bd21 as plant material in this study.
